Name: FDirectorTrackCut
Description:
A track type used for binding the view of a Player (attached to this tracks group) to the actor of a different group.
 
 
 Information for one cut in this track.

Variables.Name: TransitionTime
Variables.Description: Time taken to move view to new camera.

Variables.Name: TargetCamGroup
Variables.Description: GroupName of UInterpGroup to cut viewpoint to.
